what: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: RClinVarbitration streams official ClinVar VCV XML/XML.GZ releases relational DuckDB tables derives ClinVarbitration-style decisions retained SCV submissions. import single forward scan: load XML release R data frame -memory XML tree. package bundles exact-version DuckDB extensions DuckDB v1.5.0 v1.5.4. Connections must allow locally built unsigned extensions.

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: Native builds currently support Linux macOS require libxml2, zlib, pkg-config, C compiler. OS_type: unix prevents unsupported Windows installation; Windows DuckDB-extension build yet implemented. webR supported separately tested Emscripten build Unix-like R package metadata purposes.

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: main query surfaces : See function reference complete schema API.
code: library(DBI) library(duckdb) library(RClinVarbitration)  con <- dbConnect(duckdb(config = list(allow_unsigned_extensions = "true"))) on.exit(dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE))  rclinvarbitration_enable(con) rclinvarbitration_init(con)  # Replace this bundled one-record fixture with a complete VCV XML/XML.GZ file. xml <- system.file(   "extdata", "VCV_XML_VCV000091629.xml.gz",   package = "RClinVarbitration" ) rclinvarbitration_import_xml(con, xml, release_id = "clinvar-example")  dbGetQuery(con, "   SELECT vcv_accession, variation_id, aggregate_classification   FROM clinvar_variants ")

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: Imports retain source submissions. Exclusions parameters decision export, evidence remains available audit alternative policies. Names matched case-insensitively trimming whitespace. argument adds exclusions already configured profile_id. Named, reusable profiles can still stored clinvar_policy_profiles clinvar_policy_submitter_exclusions.
code: out <- tempfile(fileext = ".parquet") rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet(   con,   out,   release_id = "clinvar-example",   assembly = "GRCh38",   submitter_exclusions = c("Example laboratory", "Another submitter") )

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: policy pinned Centre Population Genomics ClinVarbitration 2.2.11 commit 658b9f241eb2d43aa11214b153b19c1e18a16337. shared decision rules include 2016 ACMG date filter, classification bins, 60/20 majority rule, strong-review precedence, star calculation. XML-derived Parquet export upstream seven-column decision schema, expected byte-identical source grouping differ. closest algorithm-level comparison, use archived NCBI flat files: One deliberate edge-case difference RClinVarbitration applies qualified Illumina benign exclusion declared upstream. pinned commit, Python implementation’s inner-loop continue actually remove submission, compatibility follows documented policy rather implementation accident.
code: rclinvarbitration_reproduce_clinvarbitration_parquet(   con,   submission_path = "submission_summary_YYYY-MM.txt.gz",   variant_path = "variant_summary_YYYY-MM.txt.gz",   path = "clinvar_decisions.parquet",   assembly = "GRCh38",   submitter_exclusions = "example laboratory" )

title: Stream ClinVar XML into Relational DuckDB Tables
text: decision policy adapted Centre Population Genomics ClinVarbitration 2.2.11 MIT license. ClinVar source data provided NCBI.

what: RClinVarbitration: relational ClinVar evidence in DuckDB — RClinVarbitration-package
title: RClinVarbitration: relational ClinVar evidence in DuckDB — RClinVarbitration-package
text: DuckDB-native, XML-first ClinVar store. package-owned native extension streams official .xml.gz VCV releases libxml2 one pass. SQL materializes VCV, allele, location, gene, RCV, SCV, condition, observation, citation, attribute, evidence-text relations; versioned ClinVarbitration policy deliberately derived source records.

what: Enable native ClinVar XML scanning on a DuckDB connection — rclinvarbitration_enable
title: Enable native ClinVar XML scanning on a DuckDB connection — rclinvarbitration_enable
text: Loads package-owned rclinvarbitration extension. native clinvar_xml_entities(path) table function rclinvar_json_field() scalar compact, ClinVar-specific one-pass staging surface used rclinvarbitration_import_xml(). connection must created duckdb::duckdb(config = list(allow_unsigned_extensions = "true")), locally built DuckDB extension.

title: Enable native ClinVar XML scanning on a DuckDB connection — rclinvarbitration_enable
Enable native ClinVar XML scanning on a DuckDB connection — rclinvarbitration_enable
text: con DuckDB DBI connection. extension_path Optional explicit exact-version extension path.

title: Enable native ClinVar XML scanning on a DuckDB connection — rclinvarbitration_enable
text: con, invisibly.

what: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
title: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
text: Writes seven columns Centre Population Genomics ClinVarbitration's clinvar_decisions.tsv: contig, position, reference, alternate, clinical_significance, gold_stars, allele_id. source package's allele-level policy view, disease-level decision view, output row usable locus/alleles annotation record. GRCh37 GRCh38 supported. output retains every qualifying source locus, including distinct X/Y locations one AlleleID.

title: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
code: rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet(   con,   path,   release_id,   assembly = c("GRCh38", "GRCh37"),   profile_id = "default",   submitter_exclusions = character() )

title: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
text: con DuckDB DBI connection initialized rclinvarbitration_init(). path New output .parquet file path. release_id Imported ClinVar release label export. assembly Genome assembly: "GRCh38" "GRCh37". profile_id Policy profile identifier, normally "default". submitter_exclusions Additional submitter names exclude export. Matching case-insensitive ignores surrounding whitespace. exclusions combined exclusions already stored profile_id; imported source submissions deleted.

title: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
text: named list describing written Parquet file, invisibly.

title: Export an allele-level ClinVarbitration-compatible Parquet file — rclinvarbitration_export_clinvarbitration_parquet
text: file schema-compatible upstream TSV/Hail decision resource, claimed byte--byte equivalent: package derives submissions locations VCV XML, whereas upstream uses ClinVar's tab-delimited submission variant summaries. PM5 deliberately exported; Rduckhts/DuckHTS downstream consequence PM5 processing.

what: Stream a ClinVar VCV XML release into relational DuckDB tables — rclinvarbitration_import_xml
title: Stream a ClinVar VCV XML release into relational DuckDB tables — rclinvarbitration_import_xml
text: native extension reads .xml .xml.gz libxml2 forward reader. One compact JSON-backed row per selected ClinVar entity written disk-backed staging table one XML pass, projected public ClinVar relations without EAV pivot, dropped. XML DOM, XML blob, generic parser-node graph, R data-frame materialization used. public relation committed independently, release catalogue row marks completion, failed imports remove partial rows release_id.

title: ClinVarbitration policy SQL — rclinvarbitration_policy_sql
text: Returns DuckDB views implementing supported policy clinvar_disease_submissions. policy bins submitted classifications, excludes unknown bins applies upstream policy's intended qualified Illumina benign exclusion, optionally applies profile-specific submitter exclusions, prefers evidence evaluated 2016 onward always retaining expert-panel practice guideline evidence, applies 60/20 majority rule. disease-level allele-level views reproduce upstream strong-review rule: first retained practice-guideline expert-panel classification source order decisive.

title: ClinVarbitration policy SQL — rclinvarbitration_policy_sql
ClinVarbitration policy SQL — rclinvarbitration_policy_sql
text: policy_version Exact supported policy version. See rclinvarbitration_policy_version().

title: ClinVarbitration policy SQL — rclinvarbitration_policy_sql
text: named character vector DuckDB CREATE REPLACE VIEW statements.

title: ClinVarbitration policy SQL — rclinvarbitration_policy_sql
text: clinvar_policy_pathogenic_alleles disease-specific pathogenic likely-pathogenic join surface downstream Rduckhts/DuckHTS annotation. perform VEP PM5 computation.

title: Current ClinVarbitration policy version — rclinvarbitration_policy_version
text: identifier pins policy semantics adapted Centre Population Genomics ClinVarbitration 2.2.11 (upstream commit 658b9f241eb2d43aa11214b153b19c1e18a16337) records decisions grouped per disease rather per variation. identifier package-local suffix: view names, rather speculative v1, state whether output disease-scoped allele-scoped.

title: Reproduce ClinVarbitration decisions from archived ClinVar flat files — rclinvarbitration_reproduce_clinvarbitration_parquet
text: separate rclinvarbitration_import_xml() disease-aware policy views. exists reproduce differentially validate upstream allele-level artifact matching archived flat-file releases. uses DuckDB's streaming CSV reader SQL aggregation; invoke Python, Hail, VEP, PM5 logic.

title: ClinVar relational schema SQL — rclinvarbitration_schema_sql
text: Returns DuckDB DDL focused ClinVar schema. Public identifiers domain relations retained directly: VCV variants, alleles assembly locations, genes, RCV aggregates, SCV submissions, conditions, observations, citations, attributes, attributable discovery text. XML parser nodes persisted. release catalogue enforces small primary key; release-scale analytical tables expose logical key columns without DuckDB ART indexes complete imports remain memory-bounded.

title: ClinVar relational schema SQL — rclinvarbitration_schema_sql
ClinVar relational schema SQL — rclinvarbitration_schema_sql
text: named character vector SQL statements.

title: RClinVarbitration 0.1.1
text: Add submitter_exclusions XML-derived Parquet exporter. Direct exclusions normalized case-insensitively, combined selected named profile, applied without deleting imported source submissions. Replace full-release executable README concise quick start explicit comparison upstream ClinVarbitration. Clarify native Windows builds remain unsupported webR uses separate Emscripten path. Add experimental webR/WebAssembly support. package now builds version-matched DuckDB extension Emscripten side module browser smoke test loads imports compressed VCV fixture. Project compact parser rows package-owned rclinvar_json_field() scalar rather DuckDB’s separately downloadable JSON extension. Imports now require extension download, including browser/webR runtimes. Remove premature local v1 policy suffix; preserve pinned cpg-clinvarbitration-2.2.11 identifier, source-order strong-review rule, separate disease- allele-level decision views. Add Parquet exporters VCV-derived allele policy direct, SQL-reproduction ClinVarbitration versioned NCBI flat-file archives, plus retained differential script published Zenodo releases. Retain imported SCV source order deterministic strong-review decisions. Bundle exact C_STRUCT_UNSTABLE extension artifacts DuckDB v1.5.0 v1.5.4, selected enabled connection’s engine version. Replace generic XML node/edge/statement persistence one-pass, ClinVar-specific entity scan focused VCV, allele, location, gene, RCV, SCV, condition, observation, citation, attribute, evidence-text relations. Staging now stores one JSON-backed row per selected entity requires release-wide EAV grouping. Release-scale tables use logical keys without memory-resident ART indexes, projection commits separately; release catalogue marks completion failed imports clean partial rows. Add clinvar_disease_aggregates clinvar_disease_submissions direct RCV- SCV-level disease-policy inputs, canonical disease identifiers selected independently complete retained cross-reference relation. Add cpg-clinvarbitration-2.2.11 SQL policy, configurable submitter-blinding profiles, clinvar_policy_pathogenic_alleles disease-specific P/LP join surface Rduckhts/DuckHTS. Require README execution complete official VCV XML.GZ one file-backed import; displayed summaries query persisted import never rescan XML.

title: RClinVarbitration 0.1.0
text: First public release. Added package-owned DuckDB C extension clinvar_xml_statements(path), single-threaded libxml2 forward scan ClinVar VCV XML XML.GZ releases. Added semantic SQL materialization ordered XML nodes, edges, literals, discovery text, real NCBI VCV XML.GZ fixture. first artifact supports exactly DuckDB v1.5.3 Unix-like hosts; fails closed engine versions.
